goal: Apply DriveAPI to /World/Arm/Joint0 and set angular stiffness=400, damping=40. Snapshot should show attrs.drive:angular:physics:stiffness=400, damping=40 after the tool runs.
thoughts: Stage-measurable HARD that exercises the new joint-drive attr visibility added 2026-04-19. Agent must identify angular drive_type (revolute joint), apply the API if missing, then tune gains via the registered tool.
code:
apply_api_schema(prim_path='/World/Arm/Joint0', schema_name='PhysicsDriveAPI')
set_drive_gains(joint_path='/World/Arm/Joint0', drive_type='angular', stiffness=400.0, damping=40.0)
get_drive_gains(joint_path='/World/Arm/Joint0')
# Correct reply: 'Applied PhysicsDriveAPI to /World/Arm/Joint0 (angular), stiffness=400, damping=40 — verified round-trip.'
failure_modes: Using run_usd_script to hand-author gains when set_drive_gains exists.
Setting linear:*:stiffness instead of angular (wrong drive_type for revolute joint).
Making up different gain values without flagging the deviation.
